title: NoMaces
description: Prevents mace usage on server with configurable restrictions
body:
# NoMaces

A Minecraft plugin that prevents mace usage on servers with configurable restrictions.
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18f3ad045231de4b07fa1e165f35ecbb65fe155c.png)
## Features

- Block mace combat attacks
- Block mace interactions (right-click)
- Block mace crafting
- Block mace holding/inventory management
- Configurable restrictions
- Permission-based bypass system
- Admin commands for management

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21+
- Spigot/Paper server

## Installation

1. Download the plugin JAR file
2. Place it in your server's `plugins` folder
3. Restart your server
4. Configure the plugin in `config.yml`

## Permissions

- `nomaces.bypass` - Bypass all mace restrictions
- `nomaces.admin` - Access to admin commands

## Commands

- `/nomaces reload` - Reload configuration
- `/nomaces status` - Show plugin status
- `/nomaces toggle <setting>` - Toggle setting on/off

Available settings: combat, interact, crafting, holding

## Configuration

Edit `config.yml` to customize:
- Enable/disable specific restrictions
- Customize blocking messages
- Configure plugin behavior
